_fixture.description: A 200 OK that serves an HTML error page — typical Railway edge misroute where the requested service is ingress-routed but the backing deployment returned HTML instead of the expected JSON. The driver treats this as red with `malformed body: <JSON.parse reason>` so operators see the actual shape of the wrongness, not a bare 'seemed fine'.

bodyRaw:
404

This page could not be found.
